titleStmt.title: SII 8.653: original edition by K.V. Subrahmanya Aiyer
No. 653. (A.R. No. 344 of 1903). ON THE SOUTH BASE OF THE MANDAPA IN FRONT OF THE SAME SHRINE.

revisionDesc.change: Further conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrī . Aṟintikaiccaturvvedima ṅkalattu Aṟi naṅkai kuṭiyum kiḻppu kuṭutta nilaṉ nāṉkarai Innāṉka
rai nilattilum naṅkaikuṭi subrahmaṇya vāykkāluk ṭaiya muk kiḻppulattuk ki valiyil teṟkkaṭaiya mukkālum Ā
ka Ivvoṉṟarai nilamum gau tamaṉ vaikhā ṉa vabha ṭṭaṉukku Arcca ṉā Ivvoṉṟaraiyum kuṭuttu niṉṟa ni
laṉ muveliyum mukkāl veliyāka nilañceytu vanta nilaṉ nāl veliyum veli ṟuk kalavaricaiya m Aṭaittu nivantam Eḻutiyatu .
tiruvamutarici poḻutu nāṉāḻiyākak kuṟuṇi nāṉāḻi Aricikku Añciraṇṭu vaṇṇikaiyāl nicati veṇṭun nel mukkuṟuṇi Aṟunāḻiyāl Orāṭṭai nāḷaikku veṇṭun nel nūṟṟu Orupattu Irukalaṉe tūṇi
ppatakkāl vaitta nilaṉ Oṉṟey Araikkāl tiruvamutuney poḻutu Āḻākkāka Uḻakkaraiyum tirunontāviḷakku nālukku nāḻiyum Āka Ayvuḻakkarai neykku nāḻi neykku tūṇi nellāka nicati Añku
ṟuṇi nāṉāḻiyāl Orāṭṭaināḷaikku veṇṭun nel nūṟṟu Aṟupattuañ kalattāl nilaṉ Oṉṟaraiye muṉṟumā tiruvamutu Aṭaikkāy paṉṉiraṇṭum muvaṭukku Ilaikkumāka nāṉāḻiyum cantaṇam nicati kaḻañcukku Irunā
ḻiyum kuṅkiliyam poḻutu Irukaḻañcāka Aṟukaḻañcukku nāḻiyum tirumañcaṇampukavum parikalam pūcavum puḷi Orupalattukku Uriyum tiruppiṇṭikku Uriyum Āka Eṟṟi nel nicati kuṟuṇiyāl Orāṭṭai nāḷaikku veṇṭun nel muppati
ṉ kalattāl nila
ruvaviṭṭanāḷ Āṭi
kkum kāttikaiyk kāt
kku ney patiṉāḻikkum
Eṇṇāḻiyāl melppaṭi ne
putiya tūṭṭukku nel ka
kkum Āka nel Eḻukalaṉe tūṇip patak
kāl nilaṉ Orumāvarai niṉṟa nilaṉ kiḻppu
lattu kucavaṉukku nilaṉ kāl nantavāṉan tiru
ttuvāṉukku nāṉmāvarai tirumeḻukkuiṭuvā
r Iruvarkku nāṉmāvarai pūppaṟittu toṭuppā
rkku muṉṟumā Āka nilaṉ mukkāle Iraṇṭumā .
Digital edition of SII 8.653 by converted to DHARMA conventions by Dorotea Operato.
